road_bonus.condition: Unit spends its entire Movement Phase moving only along valid road_connections.
road_bonus.restriction: The bonus MF must also be spent moving along a valid road_connection.
road_bonus.notes: Road itself is treated as Open Ground for terrain purposes. Road bonus does not change TEM.

OpenGround.notes: No terrain feature. FFMO may apply during Defensive First Fire against moving infantry if LOS is not hindered.

StoneBuilding.notes: Grey building. Blocks LOS only when a threat line across printed artwork of building. The hex with building does not block LOS automaticaly.

WoodenBuilding.notes: Brown building. Blocks LOS only when a threat line across printed artwork of building. The hex with building does not block LOS automaticaly.

Woods.notes: Woods are a LOS obstacle and provide +1 TEM.

Orchard.notes: Orchard is a LOS hindrance, not a LOS obstacle. Add +1 DRM for each intervening orchard hex crossed. No TEM, but no FFMO because it is not open ground.

Grain.notes: Grain is a hindrance in season and open ground out of season.

PBF.name: Point Blank Fire
PBF.condition: Target is in an adjacent location/hex.

LongRangeFire.condition: Target is beyond normal range up to double normal range.

AdvancingFire.condition: Attacker fires in AFPh after moving.

AreaFire.notes: Multiple area fire modifiers can stack.

FFMO.name: First Fire Movement in Open Ground
FFMO.condition: Defensive First Fire against moving infantry in open ground, unless LOS is hindered.

FFNAM.name: First Fire Non-Assault Movement
FFNAM.condition: Defensive First Fire against moving infantry that did not use Assault Movement.

los_rules.notes: LOS is checked from center dot to center dot. Terrain in firing or target hex does not block LOS to its own center dot.
